name: markdown_first_manuscript_policy
summary: Hard institutional policy: AI agents MUST write all scientific manuscript content in Markdown (.md) first. Direct LaTeX authoring is prohibited. Pandoc is the mandatory bridge to .tex/.docx/.pdf. Documents root-cause evidence from the April 2026 spatial transcriptomics probe portability manuscript failure case where direct LaTeX authoring reduced a 964-line, 5800-word manuscript to 93 lines.
